title: rubus × pseudohakonensis
intro: Rubus × pseudohakonensis, also known as Japanese Raspberry, is a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, specifically a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus hokourensis. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anthocyanin content, which has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × pseudohakonensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially lowering blood sugar levels. Rubus × pseudohakonensis is typically prepared as an herbal tea, with some sources also mentioning its use in tinctures and infusions, although the latter requires further research.
